answers: Food technology applies science and engineering to the production, processing, preservation, packaging, and distribution of food. It ensures food is safe, nutritious, and accessible.
Food technology holo food production, processing, ar preservation er science. Canning, freezing, pasteurization — shob food tech er contribution.
Modern food tech includes innovations like 3D-printed food, precision fermentation, plant-based protein engineering, AI-driven recipe development, and smart packaging that detects spoilage.
Food technology is evolving rapidly with trends like personalized nutrition, sustainable packaging, alternative proteins, and blockchain-based food traceability for supply chain transparency.
